calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for Ramona Lopez and Martha Guerrero (Petitioners).
Milton Katz for Tricia Guerrero, Rebecca Guerrero and Christina Guerrero (Objectors).

Mr. Katz stated that a declaration in support of the notice of opposition to the petition was filed April 7, 2017. Mr. Freedman stated that the petition was done by prior Counsel, that he has some issues with the petition, that he is not going to stand on the petition as filed, that he just saw the notes and attempts to resolve those issues, that he needs more time and that he is contemplating how to resolve them. Mr. Freedman also stated that there are title problems and legal problems, asked the Court to defer on ruling on the petition, stated that he has not had a chance to respond to the objection, that the petition has failed to address the consequence of the death of Fortunata so the percentages presented to the Court are incorrect, that title was held in joint tenancy by Martha, Ramona and Fernando in 1995 to 2015, that Fortunata died, that there was no affidavit of death and that there was no determination as to Fortunata's interest. Furthermore, Mr. Freedman stated that if the Court makes a ruling it would be deficient and spoke of a petition to transfer Fortunata's interest. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Real Property is continued to May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Freedman to file an amended petition, provide notice or seek other appropriate remedy.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
